titleStmt.title: SII 9.503: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 503. (A.R. No. 457 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE GARDEN OF THE SANTIVIRASVAMI TEMPLE AT SOGI, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the cyclic year Dhātu, Kārtika, śu. 5, corresponding to A.D. 1516 October 30, Thursday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records that, under the orders of Pārvati-amma, mother of Immaḍi Basavappa-Voḍeya, an officer of the king, Aruha-Timmaṇa-Nāyaka who was the Pradhāna at Koṭṭūru made a gift of the village of Daṇṇāyakapura for the charity water-lift at Sōge, for the merit of his master (i.e., Basavappa-Voḍeya). The balance, if any, out of the revenue of the village, after meeting the expenses of the water-lift, was to be used for the service of the god Kalināthadēva at Sōge.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī sōgeya śrīkalināthadēvaru .dhātusaṁvatsarada kārtika śu 5 lu śrī
matu kruṣṇarāyamahārāyana bhujapratā
pa yiṁmaḍi basavappavoḍeyara tāyi pārva
ti Aṁmanavara nirūpadiṁdalu koṭṭūra pradhā
na Aruha tiṁmaṇanāyakaru taṁma voḍeya
ge pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgaleṁdu sōgeya dharma Ētakke
koṭṭa daṇāyakarapura naḍasidavarige sāyō
jyaphala �yo gōvina Aṟavaṭige tappidavaru vā
raṇāsiyalli taṁma tāyi taṁde guruva koṁda pāpa
dali hōharu siva sākṣi . śrī śrī śrī yīdha
rmaĒtake Āgi mikka Ādāya sōgeya
kalināthadēvara Aṁgabhōgake salaluḷa
du Eṁdu koṭṭa grāma naḍasidavarige sva
rga tappidavarige naraka śrīvirupākṣasākṣi
basava śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.503 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
